authentication_mode: UNVERIFIED: do not authenticate or inspect credentials during offline preparation
approval_mode: documented plan mode; local behavior UNVERIFIED
sandbox_mode: UNVERIFIED; no sandbox flag is assumed in the template
notes: The executable path, installed version, authentication state, proxy routing, certificate trust, and command behavior are UNVERIFIED.
The official CLI documents --add-dir, --permission-mode, --output-format, --max-turns, and -p. This template must be checked with local --help after approved installation.
Anthropic documents HTTP_PROXY, HTTPS_PROXY, SSL_CERT_FILE, and NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS; successful interception and CA trust still require empirical validation.
Anthropic documents that Claude Code does not support NO_PROXY and does not support SOCKS proxies.
limitations: No Claude executable has been installed, authenticated, invoked, or observed by this harness.
